Title: DB.DBA.RDF_GEO_FILL
Description: Converts geo:lat and geo:long properties properties into geometries.

Converts geo:lat and geo:long properties into geometries.
This operation reads through all graphs and for each subject with at least one geo:lat and geo:long, a point
geometry is made for each distinct lat/long pair where lat and long are in the same graph.

It should not happen in practice that a single subject has multiple lats or long within one graph.
If this still happens, a geometry is made for each combination.
The geometry is added to the subject with the lat and long as the value of the geo:geometry property.

This is performed in parallel on multiple threads and is optimized for cluster execution and
done without transaction logging and is not transactional. To make the result persistent, the operator
should do an explicit checkpoint by executing:

on any process of a cluster or single server. Otherwise the result may be lost if the server
terminates abnormally before an automatic checkpoint is made.
